name: plant

name: fish documentary projection
description:
hmm...hm hm...
you quietly listen but the documentary is very clearly made for kids, you learn the following information: 
nothing you didn't already know :)

name: bench
description:
you sit on the bench...that's it what did you expect
now get back to work, if you want to relax go to the cafe

name: information stand
description:
quite small metal mesh stand with flyers about the aquarium and few fun facts about local fish
- a tiger shark named Momo hates the sun

name: a fish?!
description:
it's a...fish...flopping on the ground
you don't understand fish but you feel like its saying:

i have escaped!! i did it i have escaped!!!

name: cactus
description: a cactus...you're not really a plant guy so thats all you can say about it
